# SmartTask Project Overview & Todo List

*This document was generated by analyzing the codebase (Prisma Schema, API routes, and components) to document existing features, context-specific role behaviors, and system completeness.*

---

## 1. Project Features

The following functional domains currently exist in the codebase:

*   **Authentication & Identity**
    *   Email & Password registration/login via Better Auth.
    *   Session management with secure HTTP-only cookies.
    *   Password reset and email verification flows.
*   **Kanban Boards**
    *   Create, view, edit, and archive boards.
    *   Custom board coloring and naming.
    *   Member invitation and management at the board level.
*   **Kanban Columns & Workflow**
    *   Customizable columns with ordering/positioning.
    *   **WIP Limits**: Work-In-Progress limits on columns to prevent bottlenecks.
    *   Terminal columns (e.g., "Done" or "Archived").
*   **Task Management Core**
    *   Create, update, and move tasks across columns.
    *   Fields: Title, Description, Priority (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL), Due Date, Labels, and Status.
    *   Optimistic concurrency versioning on tasks.
*   **Advanced Task Features**
    *   **Task Dependencies (Blockers)**: Tasks can block or be blocked by other tasks. Blocked tasks cannot be moved to terminal columns.
    *   **Attachments**: File uploading and association with specific tasks.
    *   **Comments**: Real-time commenting threads on tasks.
    *   **Time Tracking**: Backend API and models (`TimeLog`) exist to track time spent on tasks.
*   **Platform Operations & Integrations**
    *   **Audit Logging**: Detailed tracking of user actions across boards and entities.
    *   **Notifications**: In-app unread/read notification system.
    *   **Webhooks**: Outbound HTTP webhooks for board events.
    *   **Automations**: Trigger/Condition/Action rules for boards.
    *   **Real-time Collab**: Socket.IO integration for live cursor tracking and instant board updates.
    *   **Admin System Settings**: Global configuration for default WIP limits, allowed colors, and platform rules.

---

## 2. Role-Based Features & Permissions Checklist (Dual-Layer RBAC)

The system implements a strictly enforced **Dual-Layer Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)** architecture, resolving permissions via Platform Roles (`SessionUser.role`) and Board-Level Roles (`BoardMember.role`).

### ✅ Platform-Level Permissions (Global)
- [x] **ADMIN**: Global access. Can view `/admin` dashboard.
- [x] **ADMIN**: Can manage all users (view, create, edit, deactivate, reset passwords).
- [x] **ADMIN**: Can adjust global system settings (e.g., `allowMemberBoardCreation`).
- [x] **ADMIN**: Implicitly treated as an `ADMIN` on *every* board in the system.
- [x] **MANAGER**: Can access `/manager` dashboard.
- [x] **MANAGER**: Can create new boards.
- [x] **MANAGER**: Blocked from managing other platform users or viewing the global audit log.
- [x] **MEMBER**: Standard access. Lands on the `/member` dashboard.
- [x] **MEMBER**: Blocked from creating boards (unless globally allowed by system settings).
- [x] **MEMBER**: Blocked from managing platform users.

### ✅ Board-Level Permissions (Contextual)
- [x] **Board Owner**: Automatically given immutable `ADMIN` rights over the board.
- [x] **ADMIN**: Can rename, recolor, archive, or permanently delete the board.
- [x] **ADMIN**: Can manage members (invite, remove, promote, demote).
- [x] **ADMIN**: Can manage workflow (create, rename, reorder, delete columns).
- [x] **ADMIN**: Can configure Automation Rules and Webhooks.
- [x] **ADMIN**: Can set strict WIP (Work-In-Progress) limits on columns.
- [x] **MANAGER**: Can reorder columns.
- [x] **MANAGER**: Can edit any task and assign tasks to *any* member.
- [x] **MANAGER**: Can delete any task.
- [x] **MANAGER**: **WIP Overrides**: Can override WIP limits when moving tasks into full columns.
- [x] **MANAGER**: Can invite new members and remove standard members (but not Admins).
- [x] **MEMBER**: Can view the board and create new tasks.
- [x] **MEMBER**: Can move unblocked tasks (but strictly blocked by WIP limits).
- [x] **MEMBER**: **Self-Assignment Only**: Can only assign/unassign themselves to tasks. Cannot assign others.
- [x] **MEMBER**: Can leave comments and upload attachments.
- [x] **MEMBER**: Blocked from deleting tasks, managing columns, or changing board settings.

### ✅ Security & API Enforcement Implementation
- [x] All board-specific API routes strictly use `getEffectiveBoardRole()` instead of checking the user's platform role.
- [x] Database queries use scoped `where` clauses so users can only fetch boards/tasks they are authorized to see.
- [x] `/api/users/search` uses standard authentication (`requireApiAuth`) instead of strict platform role checks, allowing platform MEMBERs who own boards to invite other users.
- [x] Real-time Socket.io events respect board membership before broadcasting data to clients.

---

## 3. System Features: What is Done vs. Pending

### ✅ System Features Completed
- [x] **Database & ORM**: Prisma 7 configured with `@prisma/adapter-neon` for Edge/Serverless compatibility.
- [x] **Authentication**: Better Auth implemented (Login, Register, Session Validation).
- [x] **RBAC Engine**: Dual-layer authorization fully integrated and audited across API routes and UI.
- [x] **Kanban Core**: Drag-and-drop state persistence, column reordering, and optimistic UI with undo history.
- [x] **Real-Time Collab**: Socket.IO server functional for live cursors and broadcasting updates.
- [x] **Task Dependencies**: Blocked tasks fade out and cannot be moved to terminal columns.
- [x] **Security & Stability**: Rate limiting, strict TypeScript conformity, and ESLint passing.

### 🚧 System Features Pending / To Do (WIP)
- [ ] **Time Tracking UI**: The database model (`TimeLog`) and API routes exist. Needs frontend UI integration in the Task Detail Sidebar.
- [ ] **Automation Engine Execution**: UI and models for Automation Rules exist. Needs background worker/event triggers to execute actions upon task movement and end-to-end testing.
- [ ] **Webhook Delivery Guarantees**: Models exist. Needs robust retry logic and failure handling for outbound HTTP requests in production.
- [ ] **E2E Testing Suite**: Needs Playwright/Cypress automated E2E tests covering complex permission scenarios (e.g., MEMBER trying to bypass WIP limits, dragging blocked tasks).
